channel.title: Adiutor Update
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description:
What's New in v1.1.1

‼️ Bug Fixes

  • This update includes bug fixes and minor UI and performance improvements.

Feedback

Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are welcome through GitHub Issues.

Thank you for trying Adiutor.
